author: suchandradutta
body:
#### PR description:
This is a bug fix in the cross talk calculation method (Phase2TrackerDigitizerAlgorithm::add_cross_talk) where the charge assignment to it's nearest neighbor was over estimated. This was true for the OT modules only. For IT modules the m>

  - a maximum of 1-2 % change is #of digis are observed in inner most layer of OT
  - no dependence on other PRs or externals
  - Results were reported in the Tracker Phase2 Simulation meeting on 5th June [slides](https://indico.cern.ch/event/1628663/contributions/7129262/attachments/3289428/5881436/Phase2Digitizer_PremixingStatus_05062026.pdf)

#### PR validation:

  Tested with

-  CMSSW_20_1_X release
- Geometry : D110
- 200PU from
     _RelValMinBias_14TeV/CMSSW_16_1_0_pre4-150X_mcRun4_realistic_v1_MinBiasGS_D121_GSOnly_noPU_20260416_154858-v1/GEN-SIM_

@boudoul @bartosik-hep
title: Bug fix in Phase2 Tracker Digitizer in cross talk calculation
